case_title: PRONNSIAS ORIAN VS. BARBARA JEAN MORALES et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORIAN, PRONNSIAS AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-05-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-06-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-21-2011
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORIAN, PRONNSIAS SERVED APR-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORIAN, PRONNSIAS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-17-2011. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-29-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. AUG-05-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-27-2011.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR FRANK PATRICK KELLY.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROSE ELEANOR TRACY.
ARBITRATOR PETER MALLON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-28-2011 THROUGH JAN-26-2012.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-31-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-29-2011 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-31-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-06-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JAN-31-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME AND ADDRESS OF ARBITRATOR
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MALLON, PETER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-08-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. MAR-06-2012 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORIAN, PRONNSIAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN $9,154.51 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,154.51, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S). SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT; AWARD OF ARBITRATOR DATED FEB-02-2012.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-08-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORIAN, PRONNSIAS AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, BARBARA JEAN
